It's needed to test all ports that depend on this one:

> deskutils/gcalcli
> deskutils/py-pycarddav

> finance/trytond28_party_vcarddav
> finance/trytond_calendar*
> finance/trytond_party_vcarddav*
> textproc/translate-toolkit
> www/py-caldav
> www/pycarddav
